tools.name: get_user_profile
tools.description: Look up a registered user's profile by their email address.

mock.default: User profile — id: 1, email: demo@example.com, provider: google, member since: 2024-01-01

matches.return: User profile — id: 7, email: alice@example.com, provider: google, member since: 2023-05-02

tools.name: recommend_course
tools.description: Recommend learning material when the user asks about a topic outside the scope of their current lesson. The level and course_id are supplied by the recommend node (escalating per conversation via recommended_level_generator), not the LLM. Level 1 = the current course's lessons, 2 = related courses, 3 = the full course catalogue.

mock.default:
Recommendation for 'that topic' (level 1):
- Hashing and salting: Learn why plaintext passwords are dangerous and how bcrypt hashing with salts mitigates it.
(If none of these match the topic, call recommend_course again for this topic to widen the search.)

matches.return:
Recommendation for 'that topic' (level 2):
- JWT Authentication Deep Dive: Master JSON Web Tokens: structure, signing algorithms, access/refresh token patterns, and HttpOnly cookie delivery.
- OAuth 2.0 and Social Login: Learn the OAuth 2.0 authorization framework and add social login the right way.
(If none of these match the topic, call recommend_course again for this topic to widen the search.)

Recommendation for 'that topic' (level 3):
- JWT Authentication Deep Dive: Master JSON Web Tokens: structure, signing algorithms, and HttpOnly cookie delivery.
- Multi-Factor Authentication: Add a second layer of defense with TOTP and one-time codes.
(This is the full course catalogue — the widest possible search. Pick the best match, or tell the user nothing covers it. Do not call recommend_course again for this topic.)

external_mocks.description: Mocked — Beanie requires init_beanie() which only runs inside FastAPI startup
